reference: Hello Doctor, I have cervical spondylosis and low back pain. My work involves sitting for long hours at a stretch. I get relief when I exercise and receive hot fomentation or a massage. Is it okay if I continue with this? I also want to play badminton, which I find to be helpful. My question is, can I continue with hot fomentation, massage, and playing badminton?
text: Hello doctor, I have cervical spondylosis and low back pain. My work involves sitting for long hours at a stretch. I get relief when I exercise and receive hot fermentation or a massage. Is it okay if I continue with this? I also want to play badminton, which I find to be helpful. My question is: Can I continue with hot fermentation, massage, and playing badminton?
